// Abstract (non-buildable) comment supertype. Not a Node. def("Comment") .bases("Printable") .field("value", String) // A .leading comment comes before the node, whereas a .trailing // comment comes after it. These two fields should not both be true, // but they might both be false when the comment falls inside a node // and the node has no children for the comment to lead or trail, // e.g. { /*dangling*/ }. .field("leading", Boolean, defaults["true"]) .field("trailing", Boolean, defaults["false"]); } exports.default = default_1; ; (0, shared_1.maybeSetModuleExports)(function () { return module; }); //# sourceMappingURL=core.js.map
